summary: Remastered matrix recording sounds pristine, delivering a stellar second set highlighted by Scarlet>Fire and a blazing Supplication > Deal.
review: The restored tape offers an immersive listening experience that makes you feel right in the venue, with crisp detail throughout most of the show. Musically the concert shines especially in the second set—Scarlet > Fire, Morning Dew, Throwing Stones and a fiery Supplication > Deal are repeatedly praised—though the first set suffers from some tonal quirks and technical hiccups. Overall the performance and the high‑quality remaster make this a must‑hear show.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance (especially second set) combined with an excellent remastered matrix recording; minor first‑set issues keep the rating just below perfect.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Remaster by CM and JHS is crystal clear and immersive; a few tonal problems are noted on the first set, but overall sound is pristine.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is tight but marred by some technical glitches; the second set flows superbly with high‑energy jams and standout transitions.

band_member_comments.Bob: Vocal flubs on Lazy Lightnin' but overall strong performance.
